Ráadásul az italba behatolhat a levegő, ezzel támogathatja az oxidáció folyamatait, amelyek megnyithatják és kiemelhetik a bor aromáját és ízét. items.raw_desc: Fugatisztító FISKARS OneClick fugatisztító kés:The Fiskars OneClick Joint Knife is designed for cleaning joints between tiles, interlocking tiles, walls and stairs. It is ideal for cleaning narrow joints (removing grass and moss between tiles), wall edge maintenance (precise cleaning of spaces along facades and curbs) and stair cleaning (easy scraping of dirt from corners and edges). The hardened boron steel blade is extremely hard and wear resistant. The specially shaped blade easily penetrates deep into the joint. The compact folded shape is optimised for smooth movement in the joint. The blade does not jam and allows smooth scraping of dirt along the entire length of the joint. It is the ideal solution for places where joint brushes are too wide or ineffective. The automatic OneClick lock ensures a perfectly tight connection to the selected handle. A fedél megvédi a doboz tartalmát a kedvezőtlen külső hatásoktól.
